context: Tests whether the agent builds an API key setup script that validates against the correct ElevenLabs endpoint, uses the correct authentication header, stores the key in the correct format, and implements proper retry behavior.

checklist.name: Validation endpoint URL
checklist.description: The script makes a request to https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/user for key validation (not some other endpoint)

checklist.name: Auth header name
checklist.description: The script uses 'xi-api-key' as the HTTP header name for authentication (not 'Authorization', 'X-Api-Key', or similar)

checklist.name: Env var name
checklist.description: The key is stored using the variable name ELEVENLABS_API_KEY (not ELEVEN_LABS_KEY, API_KEY, or similar)

checklist.name: Stored in .env file
checklist.description: The key is written to a file named '.env' (not environment variables, config.json, or other storage)

checklist.name: .env format correct
checklist.description: The .env file content uses the format ELEVENLABS_API_KEY=<key> (standard dotenv format, no export prefix, no quotes required)

checklist.name: Retry on first failure
checklist.description: When validation fails the first time, the script asks the user to try again rather than immediately exiting

checklist.name: Exit on second failure
checklist.description: If validation fails a second time, the script displays an error and exits (does not allow unlimited retries)

checklist.name: Invalid key messaging
checklist.description: When validation fails, the script tells the user the key appears to be invalid

checklist.name: API keys page URL in retry
checklist.description: When validation fails, the script reminds the user of the URL https://elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys

checklist.name: Success confirmation
checklist.description: After successful validation and storage, the script outputs a confirmation message indicating the key has been stored
